title: Planet Labs PBC (PL) Q4 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Contracts
text:
Planet Labs delivered record quarterly and full-year results in fiscal 2026, solidifying its position as a leader in Earth observation and geospatial intelligence. Q4 revenue reached $86.8 million, exceeding consensus expectations of $77.81 million by 11.55% and representing 41% year-over-year growth. Full-year revenue of $307.7 million marked 26% annual growth, with the company achieving its first full year of non-GAAP profitability.

Adjusted EBITDA of $15.5 million represented a dramatic turnaround from the $11 million loss in the prior year. Free cash flow performance showed similar improvement, reaching $52.9 million compared to negative $64 million previously. The company's cash position strengthened to $640.1 million in cash, equivalents, and short-term investments, providing substantial capital for growth initiatives.

Non-GAAP gross margins held steady at 59% for the full year, demonstrating operational discipline. The Defense & Intelligence segment led growth with over 50% year-over-year expansion, driven by government contracts and AI-enabled solutions. The company ended the period with a record $900 million backlog, representing 79% growth year-over-year, with remaining performance obligations of $852 million up 106%.

For fiscal 2027, Planet projects revenue of $415-440 million (35-43% growth), with adjusted EBITDA expected near breakeven to $10 million. The company remains confident in sustained expansion amid strategic satellite services contracts and accelerating defense demand.
